episodes.title: Ghislaine Maxwell Accuser Recalls Three Years of Abuse by Jeffrey Epstein and Maxwell
episodes.description:
Read more: https://www.miamiherald.com/news/local/crime/article256879452.html

One of Ghislaine Maxwell's accusers, Elizabeth Stein, says that no accommodations are being made for her or other victims attending the trial. She says they wait in long lines in the cold, while Maxwell's family gets priority.

Video by Emily Michot / Miami Herald

episodes.description:
Read more: https://www.miamiherald.com/news/local/crime/article256219157.html

Prosecutors allege that British socialite Ghislaine Maxwell was a central figure in Jeffrey Epstein’s sex criminal enterprise, helping him recruit and sexually abuse girls. The long-awaited trial of Maxwell began on Nov. 29, 2021.

episodes.title: How Miami Herald's investigation & Jeffrey Epstein survivors helped blow up a sweetheart deal
episodes.description:
When the Miami Herald launched the Perversion of Justice investigation in November 2018, it awakened the world to a decades-long injustice suffered by dozens and perhaps hundreds of young girls, many of whom had never spoken about their abuse at the hands of Jeffrey Epstein. In 2019, as a result of the Herald’s reporting, the top federal prosecutor for the Southern District of New York revived the case and Epstein was arrested in July. U.S. Attorney Geoffrey Berman, in announcing Epstein’s indictment, noted that prosecutors were aided in their investigation by “some excellent investigative reporting.’’

See how the investigation unfolded: https://www.miamiherald.com/news/local/article238237729.html

Video by the Miami Herald and McClatchy Studios

Original reporting and visuals
Julie K. Brown
Emily Michot

episodes.title: Alan Dershowitz, attorney denies sexual allegations following defamation hearing
episodes.description:
Lawyer Alan Dershowitz denied sexual allegations made against him by Virginia Giuffre, one of Jeffrey Epstein's victims, following a defamation hearing in Manhattan. At a hearing on September 24 in New York City, Dershowitz sought to have a judge dismiss the defamation lawsuit brought against the him,
Video by Emily Michot/Miami Herald

episodes.title: How young women were lured by Jeffrey Epstein's process
episodes.description:
Jeffrey Epstein was well known for his victimization of young teenage girls, but he also had a process that lured young women, many barely of age, into his world of sex trafficking and sexual abuse.

episodes.title: How teen runaway Virginia Roberts became one of Jeffrey Epstein's victims
episodes.description:
Virginia Roberts was working at Mar-a-Lago when she was recruited by Ghislaine Maxwell to be a masseuse to Palm Beach hedge fund manager Jeffrey Epstein. She says she was groomed for sex with him and his associates, attorney Alan Dershowitz and Prince Andrew. 

Video by Emily Michot
